dungeon: (MULTI-DUNGEON STREAM) ROTF — God of Luck 'Lucky Potion' cooldown mechanic + potion-storage; Icy Peaks intro
source: video disc_rk0RkuuDu9g (324 frames, 27 transitions, 81 chat). Opens on the 'RotF: The Icy Peaks' title + a zoomed character sprite; a 'ZEMBOCK?' boss overlay (creator label) + 'PART 2?' outro. Diverse dungeons. Chat captured the God of Luck cooldown mechanic + the stat/potion systems.
map: DOCUMENTED biomes: green forest, grey CASTLE STONE, brown/orange dungeons, gold arena, orange LAVA, blue dungeon, dark space. A red boss with an HP bar ('1281/1281 (-581)' damage) labeled 'ZEMBOCK?' by the creator.

bosses.name: God of Luck
taunts: You can use your Lucky Potion again in N seconds
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED VERBATIM mechanic-broadcast (countdown 6.4 -> 4.9 -> 1.6 -> 0.4s). The God of Luck grants a 'LUCKY POTION' item on a COOLDOWN, announcing when it's ready again. Confirms a Luck/Lucky-Potion mechanic + ability COOLDOWNS (ties to the Haste/cooldown system, see [[rotf-stat-systems]]). (Earlier taunt 'You can use your Luck...' in disc_OROH0lDrGTg.)

bosses.name: (creator-labeled 'Zembock?')
bosses.note: A red boss with an HP bar (1281 HP); the creator overlaid 'ZEMBOCK?' (uncertain name — annotation, not in-game-confirmed). Not named in chat.

mechanics: DOCUMENTED: (1) GOD OF LUCK 'Lucky Potion' COOLDOWN — boss announces 'You can use your Lucky Potion again in N seconds' (counts down) — a usable item on a cooldown during the fight (confirms cooldowns). (2) STAT-CAP + POTION-STORAGE (vanilla-named build): 'Potion of Mana consumed. N left to max' -> 'You're now maxed'; overflow 'You're already maxed. Potion of Life has been sent to your potion storage'. (3) 'RotF: The Icy Peaks' title intro. (4) Ability/item 'dreadstumps' referenced by a player.
uncertain: 'Zembock' is a creator overlay label, NOT confirmed in chat — treat as uncertain. God of Luck's other attacks not isolated. 'dreadstumps' item/ability unconfirmed. No transitions named.
confidence: HIGH for the God-of-Luck 'Lucky Potion' cooldown mechanic + the potion-storage/stat-cap reconfirmation + the Icy Peaks intro. LOW/UNCERTAIN for the 'Zembock' boss name.
